external_services.service_name: Request for Review and Approval of Annual and Supplemental Barangay Budget
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Request for Review and Approval of Annual and Supplemental Barangay

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: For Barangay Annual Budget: Transmittal letter – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Barangays (through the Barangay Treasurer, Secretary and Punong Barangay)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Appropriation Ordinance – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Budget Message - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Certified Statement of Income - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BBPF No. 01 – Budget of Expenditures and Sources of Financing - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BBPF No. 02 – Programmed Appropriation by PPA, Expense Class, Object of Expenditure and Expected Results - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BBPF No. 02-A – List of Projects Chargeable Against the 20% Development Fund - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BBPF No. 03 – Plantilla of Personnel - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BBPF No. 04 – Statement of Indebtedness - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Barangay Expenditure Program - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Annual Investment Program (AIP) for the Budget Year - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Barangay Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund Investment Plan (BDRRMFIP) (with Certification from CDRRMO) - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Annual Barangay Disaster Risk Reduction Plan - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Barangay Annual Gender and Development Plan and Budget (with endorsement from CPDO and with certification from DILG) - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Barangay Council for the Protection of Children Work and Financial Plan - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Devolution Transition Plan
Resolution creating the Barangay Development Plan and Annual Investment Program for Budget Year - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution Approving the Barangay Development Plan and Annual Investment Program for Budget - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
For Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) Budget: SK BBPF No. 02 – Programmed Appropriation by PPA, Expense Class, Object of Expenditure and Expected Results – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Barangays (thru the Barangay Treasurer, Secretary and Punong Barangay)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Annual Barangay Youth Investment Program (ABYIP) - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution approving ABYIP - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution approving 10% Sangguniang Kabataan Fund - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Actual Income and Expenditures for the Past Year - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Monetization of Earned Leave Credits - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Computation of Free Resources - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
For Barangay Supplemental Budget: Transmittal Letter - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Barangays (thru the Barangay Treasurer, Secretary and Punong Barangay)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Appropriation Ordinance - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Cover letter – 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Budget Message - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BSBPF No. 01 – Statement of Funding Sources - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
BSBPF No. 02 – Statement of Supplemental Appropriations - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Approved Supplemental AIP, if any - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution approving Supplemental AIP, if any - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
For Sangguniang Kabataan (SK) Supplemental Budget: SK BSBPF No. 02 – Statement of Supplemental Appropriations - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
checklist_of_requirements.source: Respective Barangays (thru the Barangay Treasurer, Secretary and Punong Barangay)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Approved Supplemental ABYIP, if any - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution approving SK Supplemental Budget, if any - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies
Resolution approving Supplemental ABYIP, if any - 2 original copies, 3 photocopies

steps.client_step: 1. Secure Barangay Annual/ Supplemental Budget Appropriation Form at the Lipa City Budget Office or through the online platform
steps.agency_action: 1. Provide Barangay Annual/ Supplemental Budget Preparation Forms to the requesting barangay officials
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Administrative Officer V / Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Accomplish the Annual/ Supplemental Budget Preparation Forms as required by RA 7160 *This process may take several days to be accomplished.
steps.agency_action: 2. Render technical assistance to Barangay Officials
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Administrative Officer V / Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Submit the approved Annual/ Supplemental Budget to the Sangguniang Panlungsod thru the Lipa City Budget Office for review
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive the approved Annual/ Supplemental Budget of the barangay for review
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Administrative Officer / Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Wait for review action/ SP resolution
steps.agency_action: 4.1.a. Review approved Annual Appropriation Ordinance, together with the attached supporting documents budget, and checks all the technical/ legal requirements: 1.1. Income 1.2. Expenditures 1.2.1. Personal Services 1.2.2. MOOE 1.2.3. Capital Outlays 1.3. Mandatory Obligation 1.3.1. 20% Development Fund 1.3.2. 10% Sangguniang Kabataan Fund 1.3.3. 5% BDRRM Fund 1.4. Other Appropriation 1.4.1. Gender and Development 1.4.2. BCPC 1.4.3. Assistance to Senior Citizens and PWD 1.5. Barangay Resolutions necessary for approval of the Appropriation Ordinance
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Officer V / Supervising Administrative Officer / Asst. City Budget Officer / City Budget Officer (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Wait for review action/ SP resolution
steps.agency_action: 4.1.b. Review approved Supplemental Appropriation Ordinance, together with the attached supporting documents budget, and check all the technical/ legal requirements: 4.1. Funding Source 4.1.1. Income 1.2. For Supplemental Appropriation 1.2.1. Expenditures: - Personal Services - MOOE - Capital Outlay 1.3. Included in the Supplemental Annual Investment Program 1.4. Barangay resolutions necessary for the approval of the Supplemental Appropriation Ordinance
steps.person_responsible: Senior Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Officer V / Supervising Administrative Officer / Asst. City Budget Officer / City Budget Officer (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Wait for review action/ SP resolution
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Transmit the reviewed barangay Annual/ Supplemental Budget to the Sangguniang Panlungsod for approval
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II / Senior Administrative Assistant II (Lipa City Budget Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Wait for review action/ SP resolution
steps.agency_action: 4.3. Approve the Barangay Annual/ Supplemental Budget
steps.person_responsible: Sangguniang Panlungsod members (Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod)

steps.client_step: 5. Secure the copy of the SP Resolution at the Sangguniang Panlungsod
steps.agency_action: 5. Issue the certified true copy of the SP resolution approving the Appropriation Ordinance to the Sangguniang Barangay
steps.person_responsible: Secretary to the SP (Office of the Sangguniang Panlungsod)
